Overrides.Override: Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Rarity: RARE Hate Glance Lich's Circlet Energy Shield: 507 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Item Level: 85 Quality: 30 Sockets: W-W-W-W LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 4 +1 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems Socketed Skill Gems get a 92% Cost & Reservation Multiplier 15% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills Item sells for much more to vendors +1 to Level of Socketed Intelligence Gems +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Aura Gems +60 to Intelligence +61 to maximum Energy Shield 100% increased Energy Shield 9% increased Area of Effect Split Mirrored

Rarity: RARE Cataclysm Grasp Amethyst Ring Item Level: 100 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 3 +1 to Maximum Frenzy Charges Grace has 20% increased Aura Effect Determination has 20% increased Aura Effect Quality (Resistance Modifiers): +20% +58 to Intelligence +47 to maximum Energy Shield +55 to maximum Mana +19% to all Elemental Resistances +57% to Fire Resistance 7% reduced Mana Cost of Skills {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: RARE Entropy Whorl Gold Ring Item Level: 100 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 5 {crafted}Your Chilling Towers freeze enemies for 0.2 seconds while they are affected by chilling beams +1 to Maximum Endurance Charges Grace has 20% increased Aura Effect Determination has 20% increased Aura Effect Item sells for much more to vendors Quality (Resistance Modifiers): +20% +58 to Intelligence +47 to maximum Energy Shield +55 to maximum Mana +19% to all Elemental Resistances +57% to Fire Resistance 7% reduced Mana Cost of Skills {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}{range:0.5}Non-Channelling Skills have -(7-6) to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE Brutal Restraint Timeless Jewel Item Level: 84 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 Denoted service of 5924 dekhara in the akhara of Balbala Passives in radius are Conquered by the Maraketh Historic
